name: Vindictive Drive 2: Maidbot Archive
short_description: Mecha-Moe bullet hell action meets sandbox exploration and souls-like boss hunting! Experience the thrill of a classic twin-stick shooter, reimagined for keyboard and mouse precision. All Maidbots are fully voiced, bringing every battle to life. Fans call it "The Maidbot Game".
detailed_description:
VD2: Maidbot Archive is a cross-platform Mecha-Moe bullet hell Souls-like with exploration, sandbox freedom, and intense boss hunting — all wrapped in an anime-inspired, community-driven package.

Experience the feel of a classic twin-stick shooter: move with WASD, aim with your mouse, or jump right in with full gamepad support.

You are a newly assigned officer of Hexcorp, a crime control organization caught in the middle of a machine invasion led by the Biokernel, a powerful AI that assimilates everything it touches.

You join forces with Arris Fern, an ex-terrorist who took revenge on her father 8 years ago, and the responsible for the Biokernel activation, and Hex Reader, an ex mafia boss, both trying to make amends for their past in the middle of a war that is only a small piece of a darker phenomenon, the Vitakrosis effect, where the spirit of revenge threatens to claim the lives of the entire world.

In all of this darkness, a positive force rises to the challenge and helps you bring joy and hope to the world, the Maidbots.

  • +20 Maidbots – From basic shooters to advanced supports, tanks, dashers, AoE specialists, and more. Combine their diverse skill kits with powerful buffs to create your own builds.

  • 12 Bosses – From early-game challenges to two-phase final bosses. Over 30 enemy types, ranging from simple grunts to highly complex threats.

  • Upgrades & Buffs – Tailor your playstyle with dozens of build-defining enhancements.

  • 6 City Districts & 2 Unique Dungeons – Each with distinct mechanics, layouts, and secrets.

  • Cloud Saves – Play across multiple devices, including the Android version (transfer your save seamlessly).

  • Full Voice Acting – Maidbots brought to life by professional anime, TV/film, and game voice actors.

  • Community-Driven Development – Vote for your favorite Maidbots and suggest your own designs — the game evolves with your input.


The Maidbots have very diverse skill kits, from healers, to tanks, area of effect, dasher and more, you get to combine their skills with several buffs you find in game for a more powerful build.

OFFICIAL MANGA: VITAKROSIS, the first Mahou-Shoujo manga made in Uruguay

- MANGA – VITAKROSIS: Read it free online or grab a physical copy (see our website).

- Kickstarter Success – Thanks to community support, new content is coming: visual and story upgrades, an original song by the voice of Memorimo, official cosplay, and more.

From one developer’s heart to your hands

The battlefield awaits. Assemble your squad and make every shot count.
